theme_and_archetype.primary_archetype: Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy) - Modified for Clinical Precision
theme_and_archetype.rationale: Medical applications demand trust, calmness, and clinical clarity. We blend the grounded, calming nature of Earthy/Organic with 'Clean Medical Blue/Teal' to achieve a professional healthcare visual language. No generic SaaS purple or vibrant gradients. We rely on solid surfaces, high contrast for readability, and soothing colors.

typography.rules: DO NOT use Inter or Roboto for headings. Native font scaling applies.

spacing_and_layout.scale: Tailwind standard (4px base) via NativeWind or StyleSheet.
spacing_and_layout.container_padding: p-6 (24px) for main screens, p-4 (16px) for cards.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: Flat or subtle: max 8px (rounded-lg) for cards/buttons to avoid looking overly playful. Precision is key.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Left-align forms, labels, and text data. Center-align hero images and major CTAs.

components.buttons: Solid backgrounds for Primary (Primary Teal). Text MUST contrast (White). Hover/Active states must use slightly darker/lighter hue.
components.cards: Cardless or purely flat rectangular with 1px border. NO soft floating shadows (Neumorphism) as health apps must prevent visual refraction. Use Solid surfaces.
components.navigation: Bottom Tabs (Home, Exercises, Live Analysis, Progress, Profile) + Drawer Navigation. Active tab uses accent color.

Splash_Onboarding.layout: Full-screen brand logo. Onboarding carousel explaining AI analysis. Role selector: Patient, Doctor, Admin.

Auth_Flow.layout: Role-specific Login/Register forms. Left-aligned inputs with strict borders. 'Forgot Password' link below. Primary CTA button full-width. data-testid='login-submit-button'.

Patient_Dashboard.layout: Header with greeting. Top: 'Today\'s Exercises' horizontal scroll list. Middle: Progress Score circular chart (Recovery Trend). Bottom: Last Analysis summary, Notifications list.

Doctor_Dashboard.layout: Header with Doctor Profile. KPI row (Active Patients, Avg Compliance). List of Patients with Risk Flags (Red/Yellow/Green indicators). 'Assign Exercises' button via bottom sheet.

Admin_Panel.layout: System health metrics (uptime, active users). Data tables/lists for 'Manage Users' and 'Manage Exercise Library'.

Exercise_Library.layout: Category Tabs (Upper Limb, Lower Limb, Spine, Facial). Grid of exercise cards containing: animation thumbnail, title, target ROM. Clicking opens a bottom-sheet with instructions, correct path description. Facial Rehab UI includes before vs after comparison.

Live_Camera_Analysis_HUD.hero_status: This is the flagship hero screen. Immersive camera background.

layout.top: Status bar (Exercise name), Voice feedback toggle, Joint angle readout pills (e.g., 'Elbow: 45°').
layout.center: Live Skeleton Overlay (visual lines mapping body). For Facial rehab: Face Mesh placement guide (a dashed oval 'Place face here') with symmetry indicators. Trajectory arcs overlay with Green START marker and Red END marker.
layout.bottom: Real-time feedback toast bubbles ('Raise arm higher', 'Too fast', 'Excellent'). Big Record/Start CTA ring. Rep counter circular progress inside the ring. Exit/Cancel button.

Session_History_Progress.layout: Segmented control (History | Trends). History: Vertical list of past sessions with ROM/Accuracy/Score. Trends: Line charts mapping ROM improvement and compliance over weeks.

PDF_Reports.layout: List of downloadable PDFs by date. Viewer overlay for rendering PDF content with a 'Share' CTA.

Drawer_Navigation.layout: Accessible via header hamburger. Contains: 'Help/Support', 'About Team' (vertical cards of team members with photos), 'Baseline Discharge Videos' (Accordion or nested folders showing video lists).

hero_and_clinic.description: Two physiotherapists providing treatment - Good for onboarding or help section
Adjusting leg strap - Good for exercise library hero

doctor_avatars.description: Young male doctor - Patient's doctor profile view
Confident male doctor - Doctor dashboard profile
Male doctor with glasses - Admin panel user management avatar

exercise_thumbnails.description: Upper/Lower limb stretching - Thumbnail for exercise library
Spine/Core stretching - Thumbnail for spine exercises

motion_and_interactions.rules: Avoid distracting animations. Focus on medical precision. Feedback bubbles should pop in (spring animation) and fade out. Transitions between tabs should be instant or cross-fade. Camera AR markers (Skeleton/Face) must have smooth interpolation (if mocking, use gentle floating animation).

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Text over backgrounds MUST meet 4.5:1 ratio. Overlays in the Camera HUD must have drop-shadows or translucent dark backing to ensure readability over varied video feeds.
accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute. Examples: data-testid='login-submit-button', data-testid='btn-start-analysis', data-testid='tab-exercises', data-testid='input-patient-email'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use ONLY .js files for React Native Expo (no .tsx). Apply these guidelines strictly. Implement mock data for all 3 personas (Patient, Doctor, Admin). Build the Bottom Tabs and Drawer Nav exactly as described. The Live Camera Analysis screen is the highest priority 'Hero' screen; construct the UI overlays (Face oval, Skeleton, Trajectory Arcs, Feedback bubbles, Angle pills) accurately over a camera placeholder. Ensure strict adherence to the defined medical teal/blue color palette.
